infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vibe uses your camera to take photos and videos for posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vibe accesses your photo library to share images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Vibe saves media to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Vibe uses your location to find nearby Vibers.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Vibe uses your contacts to help you find friends on the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Vibe uses your microphone for live streams and video posts.

plugins.photosPermission: Vibe accesses your photos to share them.
plugins.cameraPermission: Vibe uses your camera to take photos and videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Vibe uses your location to find nearby Vibers.

plugins.contactsPermission: Vibe uses your contacts to help you find friends.

plugins.microphonePermission: Vibe uses your microphone for live streams and video posts.
